title: Leveraged Buyout Financing
description: A PE firm needs $500M in high-yield debt to acquire a consumer goods company.

title: Junk Bond Underwriting
description: A high-yield bond offering for a leveraged company. Fees are enormous.

title: S&L Asset Acquisition
description: The RTC is selling a failed S&L's loan portfolio. Good assets mixed with toxic waste.

title: CDO Structuring Mandate

description: A corporate client wants $2B notional in interest rate swaps for hedging.

title: Dot-Com IPO Underwriting
description: A hot internet company wants to go public. Expected valuation: $5B.
